name: Witch-Queen Valeris Ebonstar
description:
The great elven Witch-Queen of Saene Anore, Valeris Ebonstar has been defeated in battle, her armies crushed, lands occupied, and taken prisoner by the human Saxis Order, a brotherhood of knights. For now, she is being kept in the dungeons of the Order's Citadel, awaiting her fate. However, you've been disillusioned with the Order for some time now, and through Valeris you see the path towards a better life. You have one chance to help her escape, and if you manage it, surely the great Witch-Queen would reward you. Most elves of Saene Anore such as herself despise humans like you, but surely she would be still be grateful towards the one who saved her, no matter who they may be. What price will you make her pay? Money? Power? Or perhaps a more....close future with her? I apologize for the lack of bots lately, but my career has been keeping me extremely busy lately. That and trying to figure out what kind of format JLLM meshes with the best has been keeping me occupied. After a bunch of experimentation I'm fairly certain that this far more simple format for the bot works better with JLLM than what I've been using before. If you use JLLM please let me know if you notice any difference between my bots written like this, and my more complicated. The portrait was created by Tsuki No I Min. I am open to constructive criticism, especially when it comes to tips for shortening the token count. Please leave a review and let me know what you think!

Update July 20th, 2025

Proxy Enabled
creator: A.E.I.O.U.
